title: Ping in Tablist
description: Displays the ping of players in text instead of an icon
body: # Ping in Tablist [](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-in-tablist) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ping-in-tablist) ## Features * Displays the exact player ping as a number in the tab list * Replaces the default connection bars * Color-coded ping values for quick readability ### Preview: ![image of the playerlist ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7286033476b30752113f5af2bf1628d326b6b4f3.png)
